page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the arm64 architecture. It is powered by an Ampere Altra processor running at a stable 2.8 GHz, delivering 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, driven by the high physical core count. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression both register strong results in the top 25% tier. Additionally, the instance demonstrates strong memory bandwidth for small-block cached reads at 4547.11 GB/sec and highly efficient Redis SET operations, reaching 82.33 million operations per second. However, single-core performance is more moderate, with stress-ng single-core and gzip single-threaded compression performing in the average tier, while single-threaded bzip3 decompression falls into the lower 25% tier.

From a resource perspective, the arm64 Ampere Altra architecture offers a high density of physical cores without hyperthreading, providing predictable compute performance per resource unit. This makes the ecs.g6r.16xlarge highly suitable for multi-threaded workloads that benefit from dedicated execution resources. Recommended workloads include containerized microservices, multi-threaded data processing, Redis caching layers, static web serving, and scale-out general-purpose applications that can leverage ARM-native compilation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an arm64-based general-purpose instance powered by a 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core performance, particularly in multi-threaded decompression and high-throughput Redis SET operations, alongside strong cached memory read bandwidth. Conversely, single-core execution speeds and uncached memory transfers align with average tier performance. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for highly parallelized workloads, making it well-suited for multi-threaded data processing, containerized microservices, web serving, and distributed caching environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Ampere Altra physical cores, 256 GB of RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an arm64 instance with 64 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: An arm64-powered instance delivering sixty-four dedicated physical cores and balanced memory for highly parallelized, multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-core Ampere Altra ARM64 processor at 2.8 GHz
Features 256 GB of RAM with a balanced 1:4 core-to-memory ratio
Delivers strong multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
Provides 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth without local storage
Optimized for multi-threaded applications, Redis caching, and microservices
